# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: nginx
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: my-sidecar
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  egress:
  - port:
      number: 9090
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  addresses:
  - 127.0.0.1
  ports:
  - number: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: nginx
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: my-sidecar
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  egress:
  - port:
      number: 9090
      protocol: TCP
